MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-03-2022 Text Ruling

Notice Of And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SARAH ZISMAN's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Discovery:

Motion GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Discovery requests were served on January 29, 2021. According to the declaration of counsel, counsel did not initiate meet-and-confer processes until June 21, 2021. In cases like this where a party did not respond to discovery requests, the Code does not impose a time limit on bringing a motion to compel. CCP 2030.290 (interrogatories), 2031.300 (requests for production). Objections are ordered waived. Plaintiff must respond to the interrogatories and produce all requested documents, without objection, no later than November 5, 2021.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
